no_skills: No-skills: interacts with the sidebar and menus but does not complete the combined note plus purple-background requirement.
text_only: Text-only: enters APP in the notes area, then drifts through menus and context clicks without reliably setting the purple slide background.
multimodal_v9: Multimodal v9: switches to Notes view, writes APP, returns to the slide/background controls, selects purple, and verifies the final state.
